statement.en: Characterizing the two-component regulatory system (TCS) LytSR in Group B Streptococcus

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is categorized as cs.AI but describes a microbiology/molecular biology project (TCS in Group B Streptococcus). This categorical mismatch suggests either provisional classification, cross-disciplinary reframing under computational modeling, or metadata error. The 2026 date (future) indicates preprint/provisional status. Empirical microbiology findings are typically CLASS-B (partially formalizable), but AI-framed analysis would be CLASS-A.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 菌がリスニングして、応答するリズム — 信号と沈黙の間の踊り。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの耳が対話し、上下の信号が生命を編み直す — 菌の内なる会話。
